message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add missing gitignore rules for agent-generated runtime artifacts that
should never be committed: SQLite backup/corruption files, RCH build
directories, UBS scan outputs, agent mail project IDs, macOS resource
forks, temp fix scripts, and prompt dump files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -58,6 +58,14 @@ perf.data.*
 # Local scratch DBs
 storage.sqlite3
 storage.sqlite3-*
+*.sqlite3.bak
+
+# Prompt dump files (agent-generated diagnostic exports)
+prompt_dump*.md
+modules/prompt_dump*.md
+
+# macOS resource fork files
+._*
 
 # bv graph output
 --graph-format.svg
